# PartyType enumeration

Party size category. Matches `Zproto.ETeamMemberType`.

```csharp
public enum PartyType
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Solo | `-1` | Not currently in a party. |
| Regular5 | `0` | Regular 5-person party. Matches `ETeamMemberTypeFive`. |
| Raid20 | `1` | 20-person raid. Matches `ETeamMemberTypeTwenty`. |
